items.title: Can Digital Retail & E-Commerce Boost Procter & Gamble's Volume?
items.description: Can PG's push into digital retail and e-commerce reignite volume growth? Strong brands, data and AI may turn online discovery into incremental sales.

items.title: February's 5 Dividend Growth Stocks With Yields Up To 8.05%
Walmart Livestream And Sustainability Recognition Shape Procter And Gamble Story
items.description: Walmart and Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) are collaborating on a shoppable livestream event tied to the Winter Olympics, allowing viewers to buy P&G products in real time. The event blends entertainment and commerce by using the Olympic setting to connect household brands with viewers during a major global sports moment. Separately, P&G Chief Sustainability Officer Virginie Helias has been named among the world's top sustainability leaders, recognizing the company's work in this area. For you...

items.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Procter & Gamble (PG) Analyst Upgrades Amid Insider Stock Sales
items.description: In early February 2026, Procter & Gamble reported fiscal second-quarter earnings that slightly exceeded earnings per share expectations while falling short on revenue, alongside a series of executive stock sales led by Executive Chairman Jon Moeller totaling roughly US$28.10 million. At the same time, multiple major analysts raised their views on the company, emphasizing confidence in P&G’s growth and margin potential despite these insider transactions. Analysts’ willingness to turn more...

items.title: Investors Heavily Search Procter & Gamble Company (The) (PG): Here is What You Need to Know
items.description: P&G (PG) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.
